description:
Add public API surface so downstream consumers (claudestory adapter, any future tooling) can import typed schemas from @amirshayegh/lenses without inlining parallel type definitions.

Currently src/index.ts only exports the MCP server main entry. Adapter consumers need:
- ReviewVerdictSchema + ReviewVerdict type
- MergedFinding type
- LensFinding + LensFindingSchema
- DeferralKey + DeferralKeySchema
- SeveritySchema + Severity type
- Stage type
- LensId type (from lenses/prompts)

Scope:
- Add src/index.ts re-exports only. No new logic.
- Include a small smoke test: `import { ReviewVerdictSchema } from "@amirshayegh/lenses"` parses a minimal valid verdict.
- Update package.json `"exports"` field if needed to surface the types.
- Do NOT expose internal modules (merger internals, cache internals, state machine) -- adapter consumers should not reach into those.

Unblocks T-016 (claudestory adapter) when it is picked up later in a fresh claudestory session. Fully in-scope for the lenses repo; no cross-repo changes.
title: Public API exports -- src/index.ts re-exports for downstream consumers
